summary: Eunpyeong went DPK strongly (박주민 갑 64.29 — highest single-district margin in Seoul, 강병원 을 57.41). Residential north-west, mixed-income, low commercial gradient.

issues.label: Progressive identity
issues.description: Multi-cycle DPK dominance; 박주민's near-supermajority margin reflects deep base.

issues.label: Residential middle-class base
issues.description: Predominantly residential; no major finance/commercial anchor.

issues.label: Eunpyeong New Town effect
issues.description: 2000s뉴타운 redevelopment shifted demographics; effect direction unclear.
